summary: There is no direct evidence linking the FTO gene to pancreatic cancer development; while FTO influences obesity—an associated risk factor—no studies show a mechanistic connection between FTO and pancreatic tumorigenesis. Therefore, FTO does not promote pancreatic cancer according to current knowledge.
